since_last: 54% of 99 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +0.81%; AI bubble risk 51 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 54% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.81% · BTC +1.90% · Gold -0.36% · Nasdaq100 +1.62%. 54% of 99 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +0.81%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +0.81%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -1.09%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: DV is the standout at -8.56%
cards.body: Leaders: META +2.90%, BABA +2.47%, OKTA +1.94%, NOW +1.85%, UEC +1.57%. Laggards: DV -8.56%, TLN -4.86%, NXE -2.74%, INTC -2.72%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.35% at $150.11
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.35% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 51 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 51/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
